feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Israeli Paraplegic Diver Dons Wet Suit To Clean up Sea From Trash & Debris

link.title: Israeli Paraplegic Diver Dons Wet Suit To Clean up Sea From Trash & Debris

entry.content: Off the Israeli coast, trash is being cleaned up in the Mediterranean Sea by a man paralyzed from the waist down. Buzz60’s Mercer Morrison has the story.
entry.summary: Off the Israeli coast, trash is being cleaned up in the Mediterranean Sea by a man paralyzed from the waist down. Buzz60’s Mercer Morrison has the story.

entry.title: Kellyanne Conway to Leave White House, Husband George to Leave Lincoln Project to Focus on Family

link.title: Kellyanne Conway to Leave White House, Husband George to Leave Lincoln Project to Focus on Family

entry.content: Kellyanne Conway, one of President Trump’s staunchest and most visible allies, is set to leave the White House at the end of August. Veuer’s Justin Kircher has the story.
entry.summary: Kellyanne Conway, one of President Trump’s staunchest and most visible allies, is set to leave the White House at the end of August. Veuer’s Justin Kircher has the story.

entry.title: Kamala Harris assails Donald Trump’s ‘reckless disregard’ for American people

link.title: Kamala Harris assails Donald Trump’s ‘reckless disregard’ for American people

entry.content:
Kamala Harris launched a withering attack on Donald Trump’s leadership hours before he will accept his party’s re-nomination on Thursday, accusing the president of demonstrating a “reckless disregard” for the American people in his handling of the untamed coronavirus pandemic. Speaking from an auditorium at George Washington University, Harris, a California senator who last week became the first woman of color to accept the vice-presidential nomination of a major party, unfurled a wide-ranging offensive against Trump to address what she said was “a reality completely absent from this week’s Republican national convention”.“The Republican convention is designed for one purpose: to soothe Donald Trump’s ego, to make him feel good,” Harris said. “But here’s the thing: he’s the president of the United States, and it’s not supposed to be about him. It’s supposed to be about the health and the safety and the wellbeing of the American people.”“On that measure,” she continued, “Donald Trump has failed.”Harris, a former prosecutor, methodically detailed Trump’s response to the pandemic from his early praise of the Chinese government to his focus on the stock market.“Right at the moment we needed him to be tough on the Chinese government, he caved,” she said. “Instead of rising to meet the most difficult moment of his presidency, Donald Trump froze. He was scared, and he was petty and he was vindictive.”She continued: “He got it wrong from the beginning and then he got it wrong again and again and the consequences have been catastrophic.
All data is taken from the source:
Article Link:
#harris #phillynews #fortmyersnews #news #nytimes #cnn #newsnow
entry.summary: Kamala Harris launched a withering attack on Donald Trump’s leadership hours before he will accept his party’s re-nomination on Thursday, accusing the president of demonstrating a “reckless disregard” for the American people in his handling of the untamed coronavirus pandemic. Speaking from an auditorium at George Washington University, Harris, a California senator who last week became the first woman of color to accept the vice-presidential nomination of a major party, unfurled a wide-ranging offensive against Trump to address what she said was “a reality completely absent from this week’s Republican national convention”.“The Republican convention is designed for one purpose: to soothe Donald Trump’s ego, to make him feel good,” Harris said. “But here’s the thing: he’s the president of the United States, and it’s not supposed to be about him. It’s supposed to be about the health and the safety and the wellbeing of the American people.”“On that measure,” she continued, “Donald Trump has failed.”Harris, a former prosecutor, methodically detailed Trump’s response to the pandemic from his early praise of the Chinese government to his focus on the stock market.“Right at the moment we needed him to be tough on the Chinese government, he caved,” she said. “Instead of rising to meet the most difficult moment of his presidency, Donald Trump froze. He was scared, and he was petty and he was vindictive.”She continued: “He got it wrong from the beginning and then he got it wrong again and again and the consequences have been catastrophic. All data is taken from the source: Article Link: #harris #phillynews #fortmyersnews #news #nytimes #cnn #newsnow

entry.title: Rangeela On Location Aamir Khan Urmila Matondkar Flashback Video

link.title: Rangeela On Location Aamir Khan Urmila Matondkar Flashback Video

entry.content: Catch a glimpse of the shooting of 1995 film Rangeela starring Aamir Khan, Urmila Matondkar and Jackie Shroff in lead roles.Rangeela is a romantic comedy film written, directed and produced by Ram Gopal Varma. Music of the film was given by AR Rahman and it was his debut Hindi film with original score and soundtrack. Prior to this, his Hindi releases were dubbed versions of Tamil, Telugu and Malayalam films.The film was a major box office success and even won the hearts of critics. It won seven Filmfare Awards that year. It is said that this Hindi film inspired the 2004 Hollywood film ‘Win a date with Tad Hamilton’. #AamirKhan #UrmilaMatondkar #Rangeela
entry.summary: Catch a glimpse of the shooting of 1995 film Rangeela starring Aamir Khan, Urmila Matondkar and Jackie Shroff in lead roles.Rangeela is a romantic comedy film written, directed and produced by Ram Gopal Varma. Music of the film was given by AR Rahman and it was his debut Hindi film with original score and soundtrack. Prior to this, his Hindi releases were dubbed versions of Tamil, Telugu and Malayalam films.The film was a major box office success and even won the hearts of critics. It won seven Filmfare Awards that year. It is said that this Hindi film inspired the 2004 Hollywood film ‘Win a date with Tad Hamilton’. #AamirKhan #UrmilaMatondkar #Rangeela

entry.title: Haryana के CM मनोहर लाल खट्टर 3 दिन के लिए हुए होम क्वारंटीन, ट्वीट कर दी जानकारी वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Haryana के CM मनोहर लाल खट्टर 3 दिन के लिए हुए होम क्वारंटीन, ट्वीट कर दी जानकारी वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The Chief Minister of Haryana has been quarantined for 3 days, because yesterday he came in contact with Water Power Minister Gajendra Singh Shekhawat. The Corona report of Gajendra Singh Shekhawat came positive yesterday. In this regard, Manohar Lal Khattar tweeted that I have come in contact with such people, in which symptoms of corona have been found.
हरियाणा के मुख्यमंत्री 3 दिन के लिए क्वांरटीन हो चुके हैं, क्योंकि बीते कल वह जलशक्ति मंत्री गजेंद्र सिंह शेखावत के संपर्क में आए थे. गजेंद्र सिंह शेखावत की कोरोना रिपोर्ट बीते कल पॉजिटिव आई थी. इस बाबत मनोहर लाल खट्टर ने ट्वीट करते हुए कहा कि मैं ऐसे लोगों के संपर्क में आया हूं, जिनमें कोरोना के लक्षण पाए गए है.
#Haryana #CMManoharLalKhattar #HomeQuarantined
entry.summary: The Chief Minister of Haryana has been quarantined for 3 days, because yesterday he came in contact with Water Power Minister Gajendra Singh Shekhawat. The Corona report of Gajendra Singh Shekhawat came positive yesterday. In this regard, Manohar Lal Khattar tweeted that I have come in contact with such people, in which symptoms of corona have been found. हरियाणा के मुख्यमंत्री 3 दिन के लिए क्वांरटीन हो चुके हैं, क्योंकि बीते कल वह जलशक्ति मंत्री गजेंद्र सिंह शेखावत के संपर्क में आए थे. गजेंद्र सिंह शेखावत की कोरोना रिपोर्ट बीते कल पॉजिटिव आई थी. इस बाबत मनोहर लाल खट्टर ने ट्वीट करते हुए कहा कि मैं ऐसे लोगों के संपर्क में आया हूं, जिनमें कोरोना के लक्षण पाए गए है. #Haryana #CMManoharLalKhattar #HomeQuarantined

entry.title: Gibran Mabuk dan Cekcok ke Nikita Willy, Roy Marten Minta Maaf

link.title: Gibran Mabuk dan Cekcok ke Nikita Willy, Roy Marten Minta Maaf

entry.content:
Kepada wartawan, Roy Marten mengaku bahwa putra sulungnya, Gading Marten memwakili adiknya sudah meminta maaf kepada Nikita Willy.
Link Terkait:
Aktor senior Roy Marten bicara soal putra bungsunya, Gibran Marten yang mabuk disebuah klub. Dalam kondisi teler, Gibran sampai cekcok mulut dengan Nikita Willy dan calon suami, Indra Priawan Djokosoetono.
Kepada wartawan, Roy Marten mengaku bahwa putra sulungnya, Gading Marten memwakili adiknya sudah meminta maaf kepada Nikita Willy.
Selain itu, Roy Marten juga menghimbau kepada putra-putranya saat minum-minuman berakholo mesti dapat mengkontrol emosi. Simak selengkapnya dalam video di atas.
#RoyMarten #Gibran #NikitaWilly
Video Editor: Heriyanto
==================================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Kepada wartawan, Roy Marten mengaku bahwa putra sulungnya, Gading Marten memwakili adiknya sudah meminta maaf kepada Nikita Willy. Link Terkait: Aktor senior Roy Marten bicara soal putra bungsunya, Gibran Marten yang mabuk disebuah klub. Dalam kondisi teler, Gibran sampai cekcok mulut dengan Nikita Willy dan calon suami, Indra Priawan Djokosoetono. Kepada wartawan, Roy Marten mengaku bahwa putra sulungnya, Gading Marten memwakili adiknya sudah meminta maaf kepada Nikita Willy. Selain itu, Roy Marten juga menghimbau kepada putra-putranya saat minum-minuman berakholo mesti dapat mengkontrol emosi. Simak selengkapnya dalam video di atas. #RoyMarten #Gibran #NikitaWilly Video Editor: Heriyanto ================================== Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: Twitter:

entry.title: RuPaul’s Drag Race: Vegas Revue : Season 1 Episode 2 ~ VH1

link.title: RuPaul’s Drag Race: Vegas Revue : Season 1 Episode 2 ~ VH1

entry.content:
RuPaul’s Drag Race: Vegas Revue Season 1 Episode 2
Click Here : [[ ]]
Storyline :
Follow Naomi Smalls, Derrick Barry, Vanessa Vanjie Mateo and other queens from RuPaul’s Drag Race as Mama Ru leads them through the next level in their careers with a Las Vegas residency.
Air Date: 2020-08-28
Genre: Reality
Network : VH1

entry.title: Black Voices UK: ‘Black History Is Just As Important For White Children’

link.title: Black Voices UK: ‘Black History Is Just As Important For White Children’

entry.content: ‘Black Voices HuffPost UK’ is a chance for an inspiring conversation about race, society and change. Aiming to elevate Black voices, and the experiences that shape their lives in contemporary Britain and beyond. In this episode, host Yinka Bokini, Singer/Songwriter Jamelia, CBBC presenter Rhys Stephenson and Lavinya Stennett from The Black Curriculum discuss education, with particular focus through the lens of parents.
entry.summary: ‘Black Voices HuffPost UK’ is a chance for an inspiring conversation about race, society and change. Aiming to elevate Black voices, and the experiences that shape their lives in contemporary Britain and beyond. In this episode, host Yinka Bokini, Singer/Songwriter Jamelia, CBBC presenter Rhys Stephenson and Lavinya Stennett from The Black Curriculum discuss education, with particular focus through the lens of parents.

entry.title: Tour de France 2020 - Pierre Rolland : ‘J’ai hâte que ça parte et qu’on parle vélo’

link.title: Tour de France 2020 - Pierre Rolland : ‘J’ai hâte que ça parte et qu’on parle vélo’

entry.content: La sélection complète de la formation B&B Hotels-Vital Concept pour le Tour de France 2020 est désormais connue. Après les annonces de la présence de Bryan Coquard, Pierre Rolland, Jens Debusschere, Kévin Réza, Quentin Pacher et Cyril Gautier, les noms de Cyril Barthe et de Maxime Chevalier ont été dévoilés ce lundi. Âgés respectivement de 24 et 21 ans, le Béarnais et le Ligérien disputeront ainsi leur première Grande Boucle. Né en 1999 et passé professionnel en février dernier, le talentueux Maxime Chevalier - en qui son manager général Jérôme Pineau croit beaucoup - devrait être le benjamin du Tour 2020.
entry.summary: La sélection complète de la formation B&B Hotels-Vital Concept pour le Tour de France 2020 est désormais connue. Après les annonces de la présence de Bryan Coquard, Pierre Rolland, Jens Debusschere, Kévin Réza, Quentin Pacher et Cyril Gautier, les noms de Cyril Barthe et de Maxime Chevalier ont été dévoilés ce lundi. Âgés respectivement de 24 et 21 ans, le Béarnais et le Ligérien disputeront ainsi leur première Grande Boucle. Né en 1999 et passé professionnel en février dernier, le talentueux Maxime Chevalier - en qui son manager général Jérôme Pineau croit beaucoup - devrait être le benjamin du Tour 2020.

entry.title: 2021 Ram 1500 TRX Overview Feature

link.title: 2021 Ram 1500 TRX Overview Feature

entry.content: The new 2021 Ram 1500 TRX is the apex predator of the truck world and cements Ram Truck as North America’s off-road truck leader. The Ram 1500 TRX expands the light-duty lineup and sets the benchmark for extreme performance pickup trucks. Designed bolt by bolt to significantly outperform every other truck, the 2021 Ram 1500 TRX has been tested to handle the most punishing conditions with extreme durability. Powered by the 702-horsepower supercharged 6.2-liter HEMI® V-8 engine, the 2021 Ram 1500 TRX delivers a top speed of 118 mph on its way to being the quickest, fastest and most powerful mass-produced half-ton pickup truck in the world. New integrated fender flares add eight inches of body width, making room for new 18-inch wheels that are wrapped in specially designed 35-inch Wrangler Territory All-Terrain tires from Goodyear. This combination, paired with an all-new custom suspension composed of the highest quality components and tuning geared toward high-speed desert runs, produces even more capability on the street or in the desert.
entry.summary: The new 2021 Ram 1500 TRX is the apex predator of the truck world and cements Ram Truck as North America’s off-road truck leader. The Ram 1500 TRX expands the light-duty lineup and sets the benchmark for extreme performance pickup trucks. Designed bolt by bolt to significantly outperform every other truck, the 2021 Ram 1500 TRX has been tested to handle the most punishing conditions with extreme durability. Powered by the 702-horsepower supercharged 6.2-liter HEMI® V-8 engine, the 2021 Ram 1500 TRX delivers a top speed of 118 mph on its way to being the quickest, fastest and most powerful mass-produced half-ton pickup truck in the world. New integrated fender flares add eight inches of body width, making room for new 18-inch wheels that are wrapped in specially designed 35-inch Wrangler Territory All-Terrain tires from Goodyear. This combination, paired with an all-new custom suspension composed of the highest quality components and tuning geared toward high-speed desert runs, produces even more capability on the street or in the desert.

entry.title: Milwaukee Bucks Boycott NBA Playoff Game to Protest Jacob Blake Shooting RS News 8 27 20

link.title: Milwaukee Bucks Boycott NBA Playoff Game to Protest Jacob Blake Shooting RS News 8 27 20

entry.content: NBA players sat out Wednesday’s playoff games to protest the police shooting of Jacob Blake in Kenosha, Wisconsin.
entry.summary: NBA players sat out Wednesday’s playoff games to protest the police shooting of Jacob Blake in Kenosha, Wisconsin.

entry.title: Coronavirus : c’est la course aux tests

link.title: Coronavirus : c’est la course aux tests

Repérer les malades pour les isoler le plus vite possible : c’est l’objectif des campagnes de dépistage lancées sur tout le territoire.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Repérer les malades pour les isoler le plus vite possible : c’est l’objectif des campagnes de dépistage lancées sur tout le territoire. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Incidents PSG-Bayern : deux peines de prison ferme

link.title: Incidents PSG-Bayern : deux peines de prison ferme

entry.content:
Des peines allant jusqu’à dix mois de prison ferme ont été prononcées,  mardi 25 août, à Paris lors des premières comparutions immédiates pour les violences et pillages commis après la finale de Ligue des champions PSG-Bayern.
Des heurts ont opposé dimanche soir les forces de l’ordre et des groupes de jeunes, notamment autour du Parc des Princes et de l’avenue des Champs-Elysées où des voitures ont été incendiées et des magasins vandalisés.
entry.summary: Des peines allant jusqu’à dix mois de prison ferme ont été prononcées, mardi 25 août, à Paris lors des premières comparutions immédiates pour les violences et pillages commis après la finale de Ligue des champions PSG-Bayern. Des heurts ont opposé dimanche soir les forces de l’ordre et des groupes de jeunes, notamment autour du Parc des Princes et de l’avenue des Champs-Elysées où des voitures ont été incendiées et des magasins vandalisés.

entry.title: Dina Jazz - Matursuwun (Official Music Video NAGASWARA) #music

link.title: Dina Jazz - Matursuwun (Official Music Video NAGASWARA) #music

entry.content:
Dina Jazz - Matursuwun (Official Music Video NAGASWARA) #music
Artist : Dina Jazz
Title : Matursuwun
Composed by : Gilang R Wijaya
Arrangement : Duta Gramedia
℗ & © 2020 NAGASWARA
Audio Streaming 24/7 download
app. here
Info Update Artist :
Lirik Lagu :
Sepiro suwene anggonku nggoleki
Akhire nemoni ati sing nyocoki
Ketemu sliramu rasane genep uripku
Mergo sliramu sing gawe ayem atiku
Raono liyane sing luwih ngerteni
Raono liyane sing biso ngganteni
Amung sliramu sing gawe ayem atiku
Iso nerimo luwih kurange aku
Matursuwun wes gelem ngancani aku
Selalu ono neng susah senengku
Tulus atimu nresnani aku
Kroso tenanan neng jero atiku
Matursuwun wes nompo opo anane
Sabar ngerteni tekan seprene
Ora bakal tak siak siakne
Bakal tak jogo nganti selawase
Raono liyane sing luwih ngerteni
Raono liyane sing biso ngganteni
Amung sliramu sing gawe ayem atiku
Iso nerimo luwih kurange aku
Matursuwun wes gelem ngancani aku
Selalu ono neng susah senengku
Tulus atimu nresnani aku
Kroso tenanan neng jero atiku
Matursuwun wes nompo opo anane
Sabar ngerteni tekan seprene

entry.title: UP experts predict up to 375,000 COVID-19 cases by September Evening wRap

link.title: UP experts predict up to 375,000 COVID-19 cases by September Evening wRap

entry.content:
Today on Rappler – the latest news in the Philippines and around the world:
- PH coronavirus cases may reach 375,000 by September 30 – experts. In its latest report from Thursday, August 27, the Octa Research Group estimated the total confirmed cases in the country would reach 330,000 for a "lower" estimate, 350,000 for "median," and 375,000 for "upper" limit by September 30.
- House panels detain PhilHealth exec for contempt. PhilHealth Internal Legal Department senior manager Rogelio Pocallan Jr will be detained in the House until Monday, August 31.
- Locsin wants termination of deals with Chinese firms on US blacklist. ‘If I find that any of those companies are doing business with us, then I would strongly recommend that we terminate the relationship with that company,’ says Foreign Secretary Teodoro Locsin Jr.
- Japan PM Abe resigns over health problems. Abe said he is suffering a recurrence of the ulcerative colitis that forced him to cut short a first term in office and said that he no longer felt able to continue as prime minister.
- Trump accepts nomination, calls Biden ‘destroyer of American greatness.’’ Joe Biden is not a savior of America’s soul. He’s the destroyer of America’s jobs,’ says US President Donald Trump.
entry.summary: Today on Rappler – the latest news in the Philippines and around the world: - PH coronavirus cases may reach 375,000 by September 30 – experts. In its latest report from Thursday, August 27, the Octa Research Group estimated the total confirmed cases in the country would reach 330,000 for a "lower" estimate, 350,000 for "median," and 375,000 for "upper" limit by September 30. - House panels detain PhilHealth exec for contempt. PhilHealth Internal Legal Department senior manager Rogelio Pocallan Jr will be detained in the House until Monday, August 31. - Locsin wants termination of deals with Chinese firms on US blacklist. ‘If I find that any of those companies are doing business with us, then I would strongly recommend that we terminate the relationship with that company,’ says Foreign Secretary Teodoro Locsin Jr. - Japan PM Abe resigns over health problems. Abe said he is suffering a recurrence of the ulcerative colitis that forced him to cut short a first term in office and said that he no longer felt able to continue as prime minister. - Trump accepts nomination, calls Biden ‘destroyer of American greatness.’’ Joe Biden is not a savior of America’s soul. He’s the destroyer of America’s jobs,’ says US President Donald Trump.

entry.title: Coors Light Wants to Send You to the Place You’ve Been Making Your Video Chat Background!

link.title: Coors Light Wants to Send You to the Place You’ve Been Making Your Video Chat Background!

entry.content: For months you’ve probably had to deal with zoom hangouts, canceled travel plans and the quarantine blues. But Coors Light wants to send you on a much-needed vacation. Buzz60’s Mercer Morrison has the story.
entry.summary: For months you’ve probably had to deal with zoom hangouts, canceled travel plans and the quarantine blues. But Coors Light wants to send you on a much-needed vacation. Buzz60’s Mercer Morrison has the story.

entry.title: South China Sea-வில் 2 ஏவுகணைகளை ஏவிய China Army Oneindia Tamil

link.title: South China Sea-வில் 2 ஏவுகணைகளை ஏவிய China Army Oneindia Tamil

entry.content:
தென் சீனக் கடல் பகுதியில் 2 ஏவுகணைகளைச் செலுத்தி போர்ப் பயிற்சி மேற்கொண்டது, சீன ராணுவம், இதனை அமெரிக்காவுக்கான எச்சரிக்கை என்று சீன ஊடகங்கள் கூறி வருகின்றன.
China f1res m1ssiles in South China Sea ‘in warning to US’ after plane entered no-fly zone
CHINA has launched two m1ssiles in the South China Sea in a fur1ous warning to the United States.
#SouthChinaSea
#ChinaUS
entry.summary: தென் சீனக் கடல் பகுதியில் 2 ஏவுகணைகளைச் செலுத்தி போர்ப் பயிற்சி மேற்கொண்டது, சீன ராணுவம், இதனை அமெரிக்காவுக்கான எச்சரிக்கை என்று சீன ஊடகங்கள் கூறி வருகின்றன. China f1res m1ssiles in South China Sea ‘in warning to US’ after plane entered no-fly zone CHINA has launched two m1ssiles in the South China Sea in a fur1ous warning to the United States. #SouthChinaSea #ChinaUS

entry.title: Pasca 10 Pegawai KPK Positif Corona, Gedung KPK Akan Ditutup Selama 3 Hari

link.title: Pasca 10 Pegawai KPK Positif Corona, Gedung KPK Akan Ditutup Selama 3 Hari

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - KPK akan tutup sementara 3 hari pasca 10 pegawai KPK positif covid-19.
Semua pegawai KPK nantinya akan bekerja dari rumah.
Hal ini disampaikan oleh Wakil Ketua KPK, Nawawi Pomolango setelah menggelar rapat internal.
KPK memutuskan untuk menutup Gedung Kpk Merah Putih selama 3 hari dari hari Senin (31/08) hingga (02/09) Rabu mendatang.
Dan pada hari Kamis (27/08), aktivitas di Gedung KPK akan kembali dibuka dengan komposisi 50 % dari jumlah pegawai KPK.
Salah satu pegawai KPK yang positif covid-19 adalah penyidik Novel Baswedan.
Novel Baswedan menyatakan kondisinya secara fisik sehat dan baik, tidak mengalami gejala apapun.
Ia tetap menjalani isolasi mandiri di rumahnya, dan tetap menjaga protokol kesehatan.
Novel menyatakan tes swab yang ia jalani setelah ada satu penyidik KPK yang terkonfirmasi positif.
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - KPK akan tutup sementara 3 hari pasca 10 pegawai KPK positif covid-19. Semua pegawai KPK nantinya akan bekerja dari rumah. Hal ini disampaikan oleh Wakil Ketua KPK, Nawawi Pomolango setelah menggelar rapat internal. KPK memutuskan untuk menutup Gedung Kpk Merah Putih selama 3 hari dari hari Senin (31/08) hingga (02/09) Rabu mendatang. Dan pada hari Kamis (27/08), aktivitas di Gedung KPK akan kembali dibuka dengan komposisi 50 % dari jumlah pegawai KPK. Salah satu pegawai KPK yang positif covid-19 adalah penyidik Novel Baswedan. Novel Baswedan menyatakan kondisinya secara fisik sehat dan baik, tidak mengalami gejala apapun. Ia tetap menjalani isolasi mandiri di rumahnya, dan tetap menjaga protokol kesehatan. Novel menyatakan tes swab yang ia jalani setelah ada satu penyidik KPK yang terkonfirmasi positif.

entry.title: घर में बंधक बनाकर भी की जमकर मारपीट

link.title: घर में बंधक बनाकर भी की जमकर मारपीट

entry.content:
घर में बंधक बनाकर भी की जमकर मारपीट
घर में बंधक बनाकर भी की जमकर मारपीट
घर में बंधक बनाकर भी की जमकर मारपीट
घर में बंधक बनाकर भी की जमकर मारपीट
entry.summary: घर में बंधक बनाकर भी की जमकर मारपीटघर में बंधक बनाकर भी की जमकर मारपीट घर में बंधक बनाकर भी की जमकर मारपीट घर में बंधक बनाकर भी की जमकर मारपीट

entry.title: IPL2020 : Dubaiನಲ್ಲಿ ನಡಿಯತ್ತೆ RCB ಮ್ಯಾಜಿಕ್ Oneindia Kannada

link.title: IPL2020 : Dubaiನಲ್ಲಿ ನಡಿಯತ್ತೆ RCB ಮ್ಯಾಜಿಕ್ Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ಟೀಮ್ ಇಂಡಿಯಾ ನಾಯಕ ವಿರಾಟ್ ಕೊಹ್ಲಿ ಐಪಿಎಲ್‌ನಲ್ಲೂ ಉತ್ತಮ ದಾಖಲೆಗಳನ್ನು ಹೊಂದಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಟೀಮ್ ಇಂಡಿಯಾದಲ್ಲಿ ಸಾಕಷ್ಟು ದಾಖಲೆಗಳನ್ನು ಮಾಡುತ್ತಿರುವ ವಿರಾಟ್ ಕೊಹ್ಲಿ ಐಪಿಎಲ್‌ನಲ್ಲೂ ದಾಖಲೆ ಮಾಡುವುದರಲ್ಲಿ ಹಿಂದೆ ಬಿದ್ದಿಲ್ಲ.
#RCB #IPLDubai
Team India captain Virat Kohli also holds the best records in the IPL. Virat Kohli, who has done quite a lot of work in Team India, has never been in the IPL.
entry.summary: ಟೀಮ್ ಇಂಡಿಯಾ ನಾಯಕ ವಿರಾಟ್ ಕೊಹ್ಲಿ ಐಪಿಎಲ್‌ನಲ್ಲೂ ಉತ್ತಮ ದಾಖಲೆಗಳನ್ನು ಹೊಂದಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಟೀಮ್ ಇಂಡಿಯಾದಲ್ಲಿ ಸಾಕಷ್ಟು ದಾಖಲೆಗಳನ್ನು ಮಾಡುತ್ತಿರುವ ವಿರಾಟ್ ಕೊಹ್ಲಿ ಐಪಿಎಲ್‌ನಲ್ಲೂ ದಾಖಲೆ ಮಾಡುವುದರಲ್ಲಿ ಹಿಂದೆ ಬಿದ್ದಿಲ್ಲ. #RCB #IPLDubai Team India captain Virat Kohli also holds the best records in the IPL. Virat Kohli, who has done quite a lot of work in Team India, has never been in the IPL.
